purpose: 90-day launch wedge benchmark: references to taste brief to editable generated site.

scoreDimensions.label: Taste match
scoreDimensions.question: Does the output visibly reflect the reference mood, palette, type, spacing, and density?

scoreDimensions.label: Visual specificity
scoreDimensions.question: Does the output feel authored and concrete rather than generic template residue?

scoreDimensions.label: Responsive quality
scoreDimensions.question: Does desktop and mobile preserve hierarchy without broken wrapping, overlap, or awkward crop behavior?

scoreDimensions.label: Editability
scoreDimensions.question: Is the result made from stable DesignNode primitives that can be selected, dragged, resized, restyled, and regenerated by section?

scoreDimensions.label: Publish confidence
scoreDimensions.question: Can a solo designer preview, preflight, publish, and share this with a client without hidden cleanup?

scenarios.persona: Solo designer building an editorial portfolio direction
mustProve: Taste Brief calls out editorial type and photography-led hierarchy
Generated output avoids SaaS cards and pricing structures
Section regeneration can make one section more editorial without replacing the whole page

scenarios.persona: Solo designer creating a credible SaaS client concept
mustProve: References steer the output away from generic gradient startup layouts
Product-forward hero and feature sections remain editable
Publish preflight catches missing images and responsive risk

scenarios.persona: Brand designer pitching a bold agency homepage
mustProve: Output has a clear point of view and strong headline hierarchy
Spacing and section rhythm feel intentional
Section-level Premium and Editorial controls produce meaningfully different directions

scenarios.persona: Designer turning premium product references into a launch page
scenarios.intent: More like reference A, less like reference B
mustProve: Primary reference weighting changes visual direction
Generated media treatment respects product polish
Export remains usable without fragile one-off nodes

scenarios.persona: Independent designer building a warm service-business site
mustProve: Mobile output preserves trust and readability
